summary: Completed testing for Iteration 35 - Mega Menu with Visual Builder. Backend tests: 21/21 passed. Frontend: Mega Menu Builder page loads correctly with sections, live preview, store selector, and all CRUD operations. Storefront header displays mega menu dropdown on hover with columns, items, promo banners, and quick links.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend mega_menu.py has full CRUD API with proper Pydantic models for MenuItem, MenuColumn, PromoBanner, FeaturedProduct, QuickLink, MegaMenuSection
Backend returns default mega menu sections (FASHION, WOMEN, MEN, BEAUTY) when no custom config exists
Frontend MegaMenuBuilder.jsx uses @dnd-kit for drag-and-drop with SortableContext and useSortable hooks
Frontend has proper state management with useState for sections, columns, items, promoBanners
Frontend LivePreview component renders real-time preview of mega menu changes
TNVStoreLayout.jsx fetches mega menu config from API and renders dynamic dropdown on hover
Hover delay is configurable via globalSettings.hoverDelay (default 150ms)
Store selector switches between tnvcollection (India) and tnvcollectionpk (Pakistan)
Clone functionality allows copying menu config between stores
seed_data_creation: None - using default mega menu sections from backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 tested Mega Menu with Visual Builder feature. Key findings: Backend API at /api/mega-menu/* provides full CRUD for menu sections, columns, items, promo banners, quick links. Frontend MegaMenuBuilder.jsx has drag-and-drop with @dnd-kit, live preview, store selector. TNVStoreLayout.jsx header fetches mega menu config and renders dropdown on hover (150ms delay). Both India (/tnv) and Pakistan (/tnv-pk) stores display mega menu correctly. All 21 backend tests passed.

backend_api.GET /api/mega-menu/config/tnvcollection: PASS - Returns 4 sections (FASHION, WOMEN, MEN, BEAUTY)
backend_api.GET /api/mega-menu/section/tnvcollection: PASS - Returns 4 columns (WOMEN, MEN, SHOES, TOP BRANDS)

storefront_mega_menu.Pakistan store (/tnv-pk) header: PASS - TNV PK logo, Pakistan flag
storefront_mega_menu.Columns with items: PASS - WOMEN, MEN, SHOES, TOP BRANDS
storefront_mega_menu.Promo banner in dropdown: PASS - New Season, Up to 50% Off
storefront_mega_menu.Quick links in dropdown: PASS - New Arrivals, Sale, Best Sellers
